title: athyrium axillare
intro: Athyrium axillare, also known as the Himalayan lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Athyrium axillare are said to help alleviate various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Athyrium axillare include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
